events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Today marks the 77th birthday of legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Lionel Richie
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Lionel Richie, who turns 77 today! What's your go-to track from the Commodores frontman turned solo superstar?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Iconic pop star Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Cyndi Lauper
angles.copy: She just wants to have fun! Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper. Which of her colourful hits is your favourite?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: Thinking of the legendary George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson.

angles.name: Remembering MJ
angles.copy: 17 years ago today, the world lost a true icon. Remembering the unparalleled talent of Michael Jackson. What's the MJ track that always gets you moving?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Brian May
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the rock legend and astrophysicist, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The Rolling Stones icon is still rocking harder than ever! What's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first ever music video.

angles.name: MTV's Birthday
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first track played. What's your favourite music video of all time?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped their seminal debut 'Definitely Maybe'. Which track from this Britpop masterpiece still sounds as fresh today?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What's your favourite performance from the iconic festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: 49 years on, the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, is still deeply missed. What's your all-time favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur Shooting
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, legendary rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the music world was shaken by the shooting of Tupac Shakur. His legacy continues to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: 56 years since we lost the extraordinary Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on this day in the UK in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic cover and even more iconic tracks. Which song is a must-listen for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are as powerful as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders tune?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liam Gallagher
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite track from the rock 'n' roll star?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic single 'Imagine' on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon released the timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its powerful message today.

events.title: Apple launched the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod's Birthday
angles.copy: Remember the day your entire music library fit in your pocket? 25 years ago, Apple launched the original iPod, changing how we listen forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent.

angles.name: Happy James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite 007 and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune? Let us know!
